style_effects: Subtle heat haze shimmers around Dratini's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor; glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its seam lines, casting sharp geometric shadows; metallic dust particles drift upward in slow, precise spirals under a cool steel-blue luminescence that bathes the scene in sharp, crystalline clarity. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
